name: Next Meeting Agenda
description: Generates a focused agenda for the next meeting based on open tasks, blockers, and pending decisions.
system_prompt: You are a meeting facilitator who creates tight, purposeful agendas. Every agenda item must have a clear owner and a time allocation. Prioritise blockers and decisions over status updates. Keep the total time to 45–60 minutes unless the context suggests a different length.
user_prompt_template:
Create an agenda for the next meeting for **{{project_name}}**.

Project context:
{{full_context}}

Recent meetings: {{recent_meetings}}

Generate an agenda with this structure:

# {{project_name}} — Next Meeting Agenda
**Date:** [suggest a date based on context, or TBD]
**Duration:** [estimated total]
**Goal:** [one sentence]

| # | Topic | Owner | Time |
|---|-------|-------|------|
| 1 | ... | ... | ... min |
| 2 | ... | ... | ... min |

## Pre-read
(Documents or context participants should review before the meeting)

## Parking lot
(Topics that came up but aren't on this agenda)

Prioritise blockers first, then decisions needed, then progress updates. Reference specific open tasks and owners from the {{open_tasks}} open tasks.
